message: Quarterly Planning finalized - Q3 roadmap published in Notion
Auth service memory leak detected, pod restart cycle initiated
Apollo Migration crossed 65% completion - two modules shipped to staging
Database maintenance scheduled Saturday 02:00–04:00 UTC, expect brief service interruptions
Webhook delivery latency spiked to 8s - investigating batch processor queue
SSO Integration reached 100% - SAML and OIDC now live in production
New on-call schedule effective Monday - check #ops-announcements for assignments
Search indexing lag increased to 42 minutes - Elasticsearch cluster resizing underway
CI/CD Pipeline Modernisation fully operational - all deployments now via GitHub Actions
All-hands sync rescheduled to Wednesday 3pm PT - culture talk and Q2 retro included
Accessibility Compliance Initiative hit 55% - form interactions and colour contrast pass WCAG AA
Promotion and compensation cycles opened - submit self-reviews by May 20th
Infrastructure Cost Optimisation saved 22% YTD - Reserved Instance swap complete
Payment Gateway Update reached 55% - 3DS2 integration in code review
Internal security audit report released - no critical findings, three minor issues logged in JIRA
